name: Greater Metro FCU
description_short: Greater Metro Federal Credit Union offers checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards to members. They provide digital banking via It's Me 247 and ATM/shared branch access.
description_long:
Greater Metro Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative operating as a full-service credit union. Based on their website (greatermetrofcu.org), they have been serving members with traditional credit union products and services. The organization maintains physical presence through shared service centers and a network of ATMs, along with digital banking capabilities.

Greater Metro FCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, mortgages, personal loans, auto loans (advertised as low as 4.14% APR), and Mastercard credit cards (advertised as low as 10.49% APR). Members can access accounts through It's Me 247 online banking, ARTIE (Audio Response Teller and Information Exchange System), and Digital Wallets for contactless payments. They also provide investment products, loan calculators, and access to TruStage auto and home insurance through a partner agency.

Distinguishing features include implementation of Multi-Factor Authentication for enhanced account security, an advanced fraud alert system that notifies members via email, SMS text, and interactive phone calls, and access to shared branches and ATM networks beyond their own locations. They provide transparent rate information and fee schedules on their website, along with annual reports and regular newsletters. Customer support is available via phone at 718-361-1002.

As a credit union, Greater Metro FCU operates on a not-for-profit basis with earnings returned to members through competitive rates. However, the website provides limited information about membership eligibility requirements, specific account features, minimum balances, or detailed fee structures. The scope of their field of membership is not clearly stated on the available pages. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Competitive auto loan rates advertised as low as 4.14% APR
Multi-Factor Authentication and advanced fraud alert system with SMS/email notifications
Digital wallet capability for contactless payments with phones and smart wearables
Access to shared branch network and ATM locators beyond their own locations
It's Me 247 online banking platform for 24/7 account access
Transparent rate sheets and fee schedules published online
Member-owned cooperative structure with non-profit operations
TruStage insurance partnership offering auto and home insurance options
cons: Limited information available about membership eligibility and field of membership requirements
Minimum account balances and specific product fees not detailed on homepage
No mention of mobile app availability beyond digital wallets
ARTIE phone system recently changed to text-to-speech, which some members may find less natural
Geographic service area and branch locations not clearly specified on website
best_for: Individuals seeking competitive auto and personal loan rates through a credit union
Members prioritizing fraud protection with multi-channel notifications
Tech-savvy consumers wanting digital payment options and online banking
People eligible for credit union membership in their service area looking for traditional banking products
diagnosis: Greater Metro FCU is best for members seeking a full-service credit union with competitive loan rates, strong security features, and digital banking convenience. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility appears restricted to a specific field of membership not clearly defined on their website, so prospective members must verify they qualify before applying.
services: ATM network access with no surcharge locator
Advanced fraud alerts via email, SMS, and phone
TruStage auto and home insurance partnerships
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 423 E 23rd St 2nd floor, New York, NY 10010
